headline: Goldman Sachs (GS) Led Taktile’s $110 Million Series C Round For AI Finance
summary: Goldman Sachs Growth Equity, part of Goldman Sachs Group (NYSE:GS), led a $110 million Series C funding round for Taktile. Taktile focuses on AI transformation for financial institutions, including banking and insurance operations. The funding round is positioned to support AI driven decisioning and automation across key financial workflows. Goldman Sachs Group (NYSE:GS) is expanding its role in AI focused finance through this latest backing of Taktile, a company focused on automating...

headline: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Faces Reuse Questions As Goldman Sachs Backs Fundamentals
summary: Goldman Sachs and several industry analysts have publicly backed Intuitive Surgical's core business, following concerns about new rules on instrument reuse. The commentary argues that regulatory driven changes to reuse policies are unlikely to cause major disruption to Intuitive Surgical's revenue model. The defense comes after a period of share price pressure and renewed debate about the long term outlook for NasdaqGS:ISRG. Intuitive Surgical enters this debate with its stock under...

headline: Why Goldman won't pick Intel over its rivals just yet
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (GS) initiated coverage of Intel Corp. (INTC) this week with a neutral rating and a $150 price target, based on TipRanks' report. That implies only about 12% upside, modest given the stock’s run over the past year. The bigger signal is who wrote it, not the number itself. ...

headline: Amateur investors are changing how the stock market works. That’s creating opportunities for those who know where to look.

content.title: Amateur investors are changing how the stock market works. That’s creating opportunities for those who know where to look.
